Sometimes your brain searches for the

The good news is this. Learning to think
in English is actually much easier than
people imagine. It doesn't mean speaking
perfect English. It simply means letting
your thoughts appear in simple English
sentences. And that's exactly why
shadowing practice is so powerful. When
you listen and repeat immediately, your
brain doesn't have time to translate.
Instead, it begins responding directly
in English. Little by little, your
reactions become faster, your speaking
becomes smoother, and English begins to
feel natural.
